The '''"Queldor" single-barrel laser cannon''' was a [[pulse laser cannon]] created by [[Taim & Bak/Legends|Taim & Bak]].

==History==
Two of these weapons were installed in the [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|CEC]] [[HT-2200 medium freighter]] on 360-degree turrets.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-02-XX -->{{Journal|5|A Buyer's Guide to Alternative Starships}}
